questionHtml: Outline two factors that are related to increased risk of developing CHD.
markschemeHtml:
a. high cholesterol/LDL/transfats/saturated fats (may lead to atherosclerosis) 

b. hypertension/high blood pressure (from stress or medical condition) 

c. obesity / lack of exercise / smoking 

d. genetic predisposition

meta.title: Outline two factors that are related to increased risk of developing CHD.
